name: system-design
description: Cloud-agnostic system design across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud — a six-step loop (requirements → capacity estimation → architecture → cloud service selection → Well-Architected review → design doc) grounded in each vendor's Well-Architected framework. Auto-engages via the 'system-design' skill whenever you architect or scale a system, choose or compare cloud services, size capacity, or review a design; slash-available as /system-design:system-design.
